artifact: Uses raceId 19 and selects the driver whose q2 equals the minimum second qualifying lap time.
sql: SELECT d.surname FROM qualifying q JOIN drivers d ON q."driverId" = d."driverId" WHERE q."raceId" = 19 AND q.q2 = (SELECT MIN(q2) FROM qualifying WHERE "raceId" = 19 AND q2 IS NOT NULL AND q2 <> '\N');

raw_response.sql: SELECT d.surname FROM qualifying q JOIN drivers d ON q."driverId" = d."driverId" WHERE q."raceId" = 19 AND q.q2 = (SELECT MIN(q2) FROM qualifying WHERE "raceId" = 19 AND q2 IS NOT NULL AND q2 <> '\N');
